---
name: 🔌 New adapter / tool support
about: Ask rename to support a new AI coding tool (or improve an existing adapter)
labels: adapter, enhancement

## Which tool?

<!-- Name + link to its docs / repo. -->

## Where does it store sessions on disk?

<!-- Path on macOS / Windows / Linux. -->

## What's the schema?

<!-- JSON / SQLite / protobuf / plaintext? Where is the title field stored?
Where are the chat messages stored? -->

## Can we update titles?

<!-- Does the tool re-read the title from disk after we write it? Or does
it cache them in memory and overwrite on next save? -->

## Sample data?

<!-- IMPORTANT: do NOT paste real session content from your machine. The
maintainer scrubs private data in tests/fixtures. Either redact heavily or
provide schema only. -->
